songs.title: Nebular Ascension III – Ascending Beyond
songs.tags:
[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[Progressive Psytrance with Full-On inflections, continuation of Nebular Ascension. Designed as an evolution: deeper, faster, richer. Inspired by Aura Vortex peak-time sets, tailored for massive open-air festivals and sunrise dance rituals.]

[MOOD:]
[Explosive, cosmic, transcendental, hypnotic, ecstatic, futuristic and otherworldly.]

[TEMPO:]
[142 BPM, with moments of rhythmic acceleration via polyrhythmic overlays.]

[KEY / SCALE:]
[A minor base, frequent modal shifts to Phrygian, Mixolydian, and synthetic scales with microtonal inflections for mysticism.]

songs.title: A psytrance-tribal journey at 128 BPM v4.5 g3
songs.tags: At 128 BPM, dense tribal percussion—djembe, frame drums, shakers, clay pots—locks with deep kicks and pulsing sub-bass. Layers include didgeridoo, flutes, droning pads, analog synths, spectral breaths, ritual chants, jungle sounds, glitched harmonics, polyrhythms, and binaural FX for hypnotic psytrance-tribal depth.

songs.title: A psytrance-tribal journey at 128 BPM v4.5 g2
songs.tags: At 128 BPM, dense tribal percussion—djembe, frame drums, shakers, clay pots—layers with deep kicks and pulsing sub-bass. Didgeridoo, flutes, droning pads, analog synths, spectral breaths, ritual chants, jungle sounds, glitched harmonics, polyrhythms, and binaural FX shape hypnotic psytrance-tribal depth.

songs.title: OME Dark Psytrance x Ritual Electronica | Night Immersion | 152 BPM (Remix)
songs.tags: This dark psy, psy trance track kicks off with a spacious intro: pulsing sub bass, swirling metallic FX, and eerie filtered synths weaving in and out. Tension mounts with syncopated hi-hats and emerging tribal percussion, then erupts into a dense, high-BPM climax—distorted leads, aggressive rolling bass, rapid-fire snares, and hypnotic, evolving textures, driving energy relentlessly forward.

songs.title: Celestia x Aura Vortex — Fusion State (Extended PsyTech Ritual v5)
songs.tags:
[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[PsyTech Fusion | Progressive High-Tech Minimal meets Full-On Psytrance.]
[Inspired by Aura Vortex, Stephan Bodzin, Adriatique, and Tale of Us.]
[Designed for festival peak hours and immersive club rituals — a physical and spiritual journey.]

[MOOD:]
[Euphoric, transcendent, seductive, cosmic, alive.]
[Feels like love exploding through light — body and soul in sync.]

[TEMPO:]
[136 BPM | polyrhythmic drive 4/4 + 3/16 overlays.]

[KEY / SCALE:]
[A minor → Phrygian in transitions → Dorian for ascension.]

songs.title: Inspired by psycore
songs.tags:
[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[High-energy Progressive Psytrance with Full-On inflections. Inspired by Aura Vortex’s peak-time festival style. Designed for maximum impact in the first seconds (social media hook) and extended evolution for club/festival use.]

[MOOD:]
[Immediate, explosive, hypnotic, psychedelic, euphoric, immersive, designed to hook listeners instantly.]

[TEMPO:]
[140 BPM steady base groove with layered polyrhythms and fractal arps.]

[KEY / SCALE:]
[A minor with shifts into Phrygian for mysticism and Mixolydian for lift.]

[OPENING DROP:]
[Immediate entry with kick+bass locked center + acid lead stabs + fractal arps orbiting stereo + FX sweeps diagonal. No intro fade, instant full drop. Whispered granular vocals close-to-ear for shock factor.]

songs.title: OME Dark Psytrance x Experimental Night Fusion | Night-time, immersive, hypnotic, transcendent | 152
songs.tags:
<SONG_DETAILS>
[STYLE: OME Dark Psytrance x Experimental Night Fusion | Night-time, immersive, hypnotic, transcendent | 152 BPM]
[INSTRUMENTATION: Deep punchy kick (mono, front), heavy psychedelic basslines (pulsing, sidechained, moving front↔back), tribal percussion (wide stereo), layered modular synths (spatial sweeps L↔R↕), granular glitch FX, night forest atmospheres, shamanic chants, metallic bells, whisper vocals, high-resonance acid leads, drones and risers in multiple motion paths]
[PRODUCTION: Extreme stereo width, 3D spatial layers, constant automation, evolving reverbs, automated panning, every element introduced as an independent spatial layer — maximum OME depth, no static/mono stacking]
[OME_PARADIGM: All elements travel their own path — panning, swirling, circling, shifting up/down/around listener; powerful low-end must not mud the mix; all FX and vocals appear and disappear in layers with evolving motion and texture]
</SONG_DETAILS>

songs.title: A psytrance-tribal journey at 128 BPM
songs.tags: A psytrance-tribal journey at 128 BPM featuring deep kicks, pulsing sub-bass, layered tribal percussion (djembe, frame drums, shakers, clay pots), didgeridoo and flutes. songs.title: GROK
songs.tags: Psytrance foundation with percussive tribal rhythms: organic hand drums, didgeridoo textures, and hypnotic flutes weaving through layered, psychedelic synths. Deep bass undercurrents drive the trance pulse, with evolving psicoacoustic FX and ritualistic vocal samples, climaxing in dense rhythmic interplay.

songs.title: Beach Mirage FunkTrance (Tropical Psy + Funk Carioca)
songs.tags: Tropical Psy / Goa Light fused with Funk Carioca, fast psy bassline with tamborzão percussion, tropical melodies (pan flutes, steel drums, marimbas), layered with vocal whispers in Portuguese (“vem, sente, toca”), playful and sensual but cosmic, designed for sunrise beach festival energy

songs.title: Babalos Frequency
songs.tags: Dark hi-tech psytrance with twisted underground energy; 170+ BPM, razor-edged synth leads, glitchy FX, and elastic bassline pulses. Male vocals as eerie spoken chants processed through delays and pitch-shifts. Arrangement builds from sparse whispers into full-on chaos by the first hook, then strips back to a hypnotic mid-section before a final explosive drop.

songs.title: Goa Trance, Psytrance, Tribal, Psychedelic
songs.tags: A driving, tribal Goa Trance track at 145-148 BPM, fusing deep psytrance kicks, pulsating sub-bass, modular synths, tuned hand drums, didgeridoo, tribal percussion, spectral breaths, ritual chants, and mystical pads. Rich binaural FX, psychoacoustic imaging, polyrhythms, spiritual choirs, jungle ambiences, and glitched harmonics create a mesmerizing, immersive, ancestral sonic journey.

songs.title: OME Night Goa Trance – Cantos da Floresta (Adoração Noturna)
songs.tags: OME Nocturnal Goa Trance | Ritual Forest Chant | Mystical Worship | 146 BPM | Hypnotic rolling kick & bass, evolving tribal percussion, detuned analog synths, crystalline arps, forest ambience (insects, distant birds, rain FX, river, creaking wood), supernatural FX (whispers, backwards vocals, granular echoes, metallic reverbs), layers of shamanic and indigenous chants (male and female, call & response, panned around the head), slow-building pads and evolving drones, sacred bell strikes and chimes, resonant harmonies. All sounds move independently—pads and FX sweep L↔R↕, vocals swirl in the stereo dome, every drop and build a new spatial journey. Adoration theme—spiritual awe, surrender, connection to the divine, even in the deepest night.

songs.title: OME Dark Psytrance x Ritual Electronica | Night Immersion | 152 BPM
songs.tags:
<SONG_DETAILS>
[STYLE: OME Dark Psytrance x Ritual Electronica | Night Immersion | 152 BPM]
[INSTRUMENTATION: deep punchy mono kick, psychedelic bass (sidechained, auto-panning F↔B), modular synths (granular, spectral, L↔R↕ movement), glitch FX (wide, morphing), shamanic chants (multichannel, echo, filter-sweeps), organic forest FX (wind, leaves, distant animals), metallic bells (auto-resonance), drones (surround), mantras/whispers (fragmented, L↔R↕ spirals), reversed percussions, thunder rolls, ritual claps, sub-bass pulses]
[PRODUCTION: Maximum OME — independent automation for each element, dynamic spatial morphing, constant evolution of soundfield, every FX/vocal/instrument layered in 3D, panning/volume/modulation always active. All transitions animated, no static sounds.]
</SONG_DETAILS>

songs.title: Cinematic Ambient, Cyberpunk Bass
songs.tags:
[GENRE: Cinematic Ambient, Cyberpunk Bass]
[MOOD: Mystical, transcendent, otherworldly]
[TEMPO: 145 BPM]
[INSTRUMENT: Metallic percussion]
[INSTRUMENT: Dark orchestral strings]
[INSTRUMENT: Psytrance basslines]
[INSTRUMENT: Atmospheric drones]

[SONG_STRUCTURE]
    [REPRISE]
        [SOUND: The main bassline reappears, more aggressive and driving]
        [SOUND: High-pitched arpeggios swirl around, cutting through the mix]
        [SOUND: Chaotic modulation meets tribal percussion in a sonic clash]
    [OUTRO]
        [SOUND: The main beat disintegrates into glitchy fragments]
        [SOUND: Deep sub drones sustain, fading into a vacuum]
        [SOUND: Residual static pulses echo like failed transmissions]
        [SOUND: A single, distant beep signifies the final system shutdown]
    [BREAKDOWN]
        [SOUND: Sudden drop into a minimal, hollow reverb space]
        [SOUND: Metallic echoes and fragmented beat loops create tension]
        [SOUND:Ghostly vocal snippets and glitchy]

songs.title: HI-TECH & DARKPSY (160 - 200+ BPM)
songs.tags:
[Style: Dark Hi-Tech Psytrance, Experimental Psycore]
[BPM: 180]
[Vibe: Aggressive, Chaos, Cybernetic, Glitch-Hop Fusion]

[SOUND DESIGN INSTRUCTIONS]
[Create sounds that defy physics: Liquid metal textures morphing into screams]
[Hyper-speed FM synthesis leads (impossible for human fingers)]
[Granular synthesis artifacts heavily emphasized]
[Bassline: Non-linear, evolving triplets, heavy distortion]

[STRUCTURE]
[Intro: A.I. Malfunction noises, Data bending FX, accelerating computer fan noise]
[Build: The sound of reality tearing apart, rising pitch shifting to ultrasonic frequencies]
[Drop 1: HYPER-SPEED ASSAULT. 180 BPM. The kick is a hammer, the bass is a chainsaw. Leads are randomized math-rock glitches. Zero repetition.]
[Breakdown: Silence... then sudden organic swamp noises morphing into digital static.]
[Drop 2: POLYRHYTHMIC CHAOS. Layering 5/4 leads over 4/4 bassline. Mental confusion aesthetic.]

songs.title: � Nebular Ascension – Tech House Rework (Limoesa Flow)
songs.tags:
[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[Minimal / Futuristic Tech House with Psy-infused atmosphere.
Inspired by Chris Stussy, Mochakk, Wade, and Aura Vortex.
Built for underground clubs and outdoor stages — high-impact groove, deep sub energy, short synths, and cosmic tension.
Bridges psytrance precision and tech house swing into one intelligent structure.]

[MOOD:]
[Hypnotic, groovy, modern, clean, cosmic, spatial, confident, deep, sensual.]

[TEMPO:]
[126 BPM steady with 2.5% swing micro-shift.]

[KEY / SCALE:]
[A minor base with modal shifts into Phrygian (for mysticism) and Mixolydian (for lift).]

songs.title: Organic Trance Flow
songs.tags:
<SONG_PROMPT>
   <SONG_DETAILS>
      [STYLE: Psytrance, Tribal, Psychedelic]
      [MOOD: Ancestral, Hypnotic, Psychedelic, Sensorial]
      [INSTRUMENTATION: Deep Psytrance Kick, Pulsating Sub-Bass, Tuned Hand Drums (Djembe, Frame Drums), Didgeridoo, Flutes, Droning Psychedelic Pads, Reverse Shamanic Whispers, Ritual Chants, Jungle Ambience, Spectral Breaths]
      [TEMPO: 128 BPM (Organic Trance Flow)]
      [PRODUCTION: Spatial Layering, Psychoacoustic Imaging, Binaural FX]
      [INFLUENCES: Rodrigo Gallardo, Azu Tiwaline, Carbon Based Lifeforms, Shpongle, Gumi]
   </SONG_DETAILS>

Psytrance foundation with percussive tribal rhythms: organic hand drums, didgeridoo textures, and hypnotic flutes weaving through layered, psychedelic synths. Deep bass undercurrents drive the trance pulse, with evolving psicoacoustic FX and ritualistic vocal samples, climaxing in dense rhythmic interplay.

songs.title: Psytrance, Tribal, Psychedelic
songs.tags: A hypnotic psytrance journey at 128 BPM, blending deep kicks and pulsating sub-bass with tribal hand drums, didgeridoo drones, and haunting flutes. Ritual chants, jungle ambience, spectral breaths, and psychedelic pads are layered with psychoacoustic imaging, binaural effects, and 3D spatial textures.

songs.title: A Psytrance-Tribal Journey at 128 BPM
songs.tags:

songs.title: A Psytrance-Tribal Journey at 128 BPM
songs.tags: A hypnotic psytrance track at 128 BPM fuses driving electronic rhythms with tribal percussion, organic hand drums, and ritualistic chants. Pulsating basslines intertwine with layered synth textures and percussive accents, evolving through dense jungle atmospheres and immersive, rhythmic builds.

songs.title: BC VIBES all
songs.tags:
[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[High-energy Progressive Psytrance with Full-On inflections. Inspired by Aura Vortex’s peak-time festival style. Designed for maximum impact in the first seconds (social media hook) and extended evolution for club/festival use.]

[MOOD:]
[Immediate, explosive, hypnotic, psychedelic, euphoric, immersive, designed to hook listeners instantly.]

[TEMPO:]
[140 BPM steady base groove with layered polyrhythms and fractal arps.]

[KEY / SCALE:]
[A minor with shifts into Phrygian for mysticism and Mixolydian for lift.]

[OPENING DROP:]
[Immediate entry with kick+bass locked center + acid lead stabs + fractal arps orbiting stereo + FX sweeps diagonal. No intro fade, instant full drop. Whispered granular vocals close-to-ear for shock factor.]

songs.title: Babalos Frequency
songs.tags: Dark hi-tech psytrance with twisted underground energy; 170+ BPM, razor-edged synth leads, glitchy FX, and elastic bassline pulses. Male vocals as eerie spoken chants processed through delays and pitch-shifts. Arrangement builds from sparse whispers into full-on chaos by the first hook, then strips back to a hypnotic mid-section before a final explosive drop.

songs.title: A psytrance-tribal journey at 128 BPM v4.5
songs.tags: A 128 BPM psytrance-tribal track fuses deep kicks, pulsing sub-bass, and dense tribal percussion—djembe, frame drums, shakers, clay pots—plus didgeridoo and flutes. Droning pads, analog synths, glitched harmonics, ritual chants, jungle sounds, and spectral breaths merge through polyrhythms, psychoacoustic spatial effects, and binaural FX for a hypnotic journey.

songs.title: Green Valley Anthem (Big Room / Festival Edition)
songs.tags: Big Room EDM • Electro House festival anthem, heavy kick and sub-bass, massive synth leads, tension builds and explosive drops, designed for open-air club Green Valley with thousands of people jumping, lasers and fireworks in sync

songs.title: Beach Mirage FunkTrance (Tropical Psy + Funk Carioca)
songs.tags: Tropical Psy / Funk Carioca fusion, bright and playful but hypnotic, sunrise beach vibe, percussion heavy, whispered vocals as texture, sensual and ritualistic

songs.title: Genesis Without Words
songs.tags: A cinematic psytrance piece at 145 BPM opens with crystalline pads, tribal textures, and reversed breath FX. Four-on-the-floor kick and rolling bass anchor tablas, pots, and synthetic shakers. Pulsing synths, modular glitches, and arps blend with expressive electro-acoustic violin and jazzy, filtered saxophone solos, each echoing and expanding in a lush stereo mix. Pads, leads, and solo instruments alternate, conjuring a spiritual journey that fuses ritual energy and club intensity in a detailed, high-definition soundscape.

songs.title: Green Valley Anthem (Big Room / Festival Edition)
songs.tags: Big Room EDM • Electro House festival anthem, heavy kick and sub-bass, massive synth leads, tension builds and explosive drops, designed for open-air club Green Valley with thousands of people jumping, lasers and fireworks in sync

songs.title: Nebular Ascension – Fractal Evolution
songs.tags:
[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[Progressive Psytrance with Full-On inflections. Extended transcendental journey. Inspired by Aura Vortex, Blazy, Phaxe, Infected Mushroom (psy-prog remixes). Designed for large festival sunrise moments, outdoor dance rituals, and spiritual ascension.]

[MOOD:]
[Explosive, cinematic, psychedelic, euphoric, deep and trance-inducing. The sound must evolve continuously with fractal-like layering, polyrhythmic energy, and transcendental morphing textures.]

[TEMPO:]
[140 BPM constant base pulse with micro-flux tempo illusions via polyrhythms, glitch bursts, and morphing delays.]

[KEY / SCALE:]
[A minor as foundation, shifting into Phrygian and Mixolydian for mysticism. Modal interplay provides constant renewal and evolution of melodic tension.]

songs.title: GROK
songs.tags: Psytrance foundation with percussive tribal rhythms: organic hand drums, didgeridoo textures, and hypnotic flutes weaving through layered, psychedelic synths. Deep bass undercurrents drive the trance pulse, with evolving psicoacoustic FX and ritualistic vocal samples, climaxing in dense rhythmic interplay.

songs.title: Goa Trance, Psytrance, Tribal, Psychedelic
songs.tags: A driving, tribal Goa Trance track at 145-148 BPM, fusing deep psytrance kicks, pulsating sub-bass, modular synths, tuned hand drums, didgeridoo, tribal percussion, spectral breaths, ritual chants, and mystical pads. Rich binaural FX, psychoacoustic imaging, polyrhythms, spiritual choirs, jungle ambiences, and glitched harmonics create a mesmerizing, immersive, ancestral sonic journey.
